title: World Cup 2026 Fixtures & Schedule API Input

source.title: Data source
source.description: Public data source to read. OpenFootball is public-domain JSON and currently the safest no-login MVP source.

outputMode.title: Output mode
outputMode.description: Choose which records to write to the default dataset.

timezone.title: Viewer timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone used to add a localTime field, e.g. UTC, Europe/Zagreb, America/New_York.

includeTbd.title: Include TBD/placeholders
includeTbd.description: Keep fixtures where one or both teams are TBD/placeholders. Useful before final draw/qualification is complete.

emitChangeSummary.title: Emit schedule change summary
emitChangeSummary.description: Compare current fixture hash to previous run and write a summary object to key-value store OUTPUT.

maxItems.title: Maximum dataset rows
maxItems.description: Optional cap for quick test runs. 0 means no cap.
